'''''Goliath''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to protect a [[Golan I Space Defense Platform/Legends|Golan platform]] [[Golan I (space station)|Golan I]]. ''Goliath'' oversaw a [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]] of fifteen [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class landing craft]], the [[KDT Group]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
